title: mentha aquatica var. verticillata
intro: Mentha aquatica var. verticillata, also known as wild verticillate water mint, is a variety of the water mint plant that is native to Europe and has a distinctive whorled leaf arrangement. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate digestive issues. The health benefits of Mentha aquatica var. verticillata include relief from nausea, headaches, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it can also be used in cooking and as a natural insect repellent.
